title: Proceedings of the Regional Pearl Millet Improvement Workshop, ICRISAT Sahelian Center, Sadore, Niamey, Niger, 4-7 Sep 1989
abstract:
Blister beetles of the subfamily Meloidao are widely known as flower beetles or
pollen beetles feeding on cereals, grain legumes and Malvaceae(Hill  1983).
Genera involved are: Psalydolytta, My labris, Decapotoma, Coryna, Cyl indrothorax,
Cyanopytta etc . Several species of these genera have been observed on millet
(Pennisetum g laucum (L.)R. Br.)heads in the Sahel (Magema and Dalhove 1985,…………………………………
